scripts.electron:dev: concurrently "npm run dev" "node server.cjs" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:3000 && electron ."
scripts.electron:build: npm run build && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder
scripts.release: npm run electron:build && npm run android:build && node -e "const v='v'+require('./package.json').version; const ver=require('./package.json').version; const{execSync}=require('child_process'); execSync('gh release create '+v+' ./release/MAYVOX-'+ver+'-setup.exe ./release/latest.yml ./release/MAYVOX-'+ver+'-setup.exe.blockmap ./android/app/build/outputs/apk/release/MAYVOX-'+ver+'.apk --title "'+v+'" --generate-notes', {stdio:'inherit'})"
scripts.release:desktop: npm run electron:build && node -e "const v='v'+require('./package.json').version; const ver=require('./package.json').version; const{execSync}=require('child_process'); execSync('gh release create '+v+' ./release/MAYVOX-'+ver+'-setup.exe ./release/latest.yml ./release/MAYVOX-'+ver+'-setup.exe.blockmap --title "'+v+'" --generate-notes', {stdio:'inherit'})"
scripts.cap:sync: npm run build && npx cap sync android
scripts.android:build: npm run build && npx cap sync android && node -e "require('child_process').execSync(process.platform==='win32'?'android\\gradlew.bat -p android assembleRelease':'./android/gradlew -p android assembleRelease',{stdio:'inherit'})"
